productDisplayName: Van Heusen Woman Navy Blue Dress
description: Composition Navy blue dress made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a V-neck, cap sleeves, two pockets on the front, loops on the sides for belt Comes with a slim blue belt with gold hardware Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergent Wash separately Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred This dress from van heusen is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels & ndash try substituting the slim belt with a broad one. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
